# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Brand Guidelines

- Always write "COSMO" in capital letters in texts, as our brand name is a registered word mark [see Corporate Identity](https://docs.cosmoconsult.com/en-us/internal/corporate-identity).

## Documentation Formatting

When writing documentation that refers to UI elements in the COSMO Alpaca VS Code extension:

- **Views and tree elements** (named nodes in the extension tree, e.g. the containers list, the packages view): wrap the name in double asterisks (bold) — e.g. `**Containers**`, `**Packages**`, `**GitHub**`, `**Azure DevOps**`, `**Environments**`, `**Releases**`, `**Deployments**`.
- **Actions** (context menu items, buttons, commands): wrap in double asterisks (bold) — e.g. `**Clone**`, `**Create container**`, `**Delete container**`.
- **The `+` action button** next to a tree element: always write as `` `+` `` (inline code).
